---
title: "Quantifying the Impact of Formalin Fixation on R2\\* Orientation Dependency in Human Brain White Matter"
author: "Lennart Bedarf"
date: "2025-10-10"
categories: [Conferece]
---

![](thumbnail.jpg)

<strong>Bedarf, L.</strong>, Neuhaus D., Wendebourg M.&thinsp;J., Schlaeger R., Birkl C., Scheurer E., Lenz C. (2025).
<em>Quantifying the Impact of Formalin Fixation on R2* Orientation Dependency in Human Brain White Matter</em>

![](Poster_ESMRMB2025_Bedarf_R2Star_Anisotropy.pdf){width=100% height=1000px}
